arts.ttl: Liverpool GREEN LIGHT transfer that DEVASTATES Man Utd
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to come to a loan agreement with Napoli for the transfer of Federico Chiesa to the Serie A side this month. Chiesa’s agent Fali Ramadani held talks with Liverpool last week, with the Reds agreeing to allow the player to go away on loan until the summer with the idea that he will continue at Anfield from next summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Man United postponement latest - weather warning, UK snow and Met Office forecast
arts.sum: Liverpool news as Arne Slot's men are due to face Manchester United at Anfield on Sunday evening but the match could be in doubt due to a weather warning and the forecast for snow

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's Liverpool assistant 'makes decision on his future after interest from Championship club' in appointing him as their new manager
arts.sum: Slot has taken to life at Anfield like a duck to water since being appointed as Jurgen Klopp's successor in the summer, winning 14 of his 18 Premier League games and losing just one to date.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher's dream Liverpool January transfer takes step closer as 'deal agreed'

arts.ttl: Can you be a Liverpool legend after playing for Man Utd?
arts.sum: Former Liverpool and Manchester United striker Michael Owen talks to BBC Sport's Dion Dublin about the rivalry between the two clubs and what it is like to have a foot in both camps.
